Localization.Description: A user accessed LDAP attributes that store data for offline generation of passwords for group Managed Service Accounts (gMSA). Passwords for these service accounts are usually managed automatically by AD.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} accessed object "{object.value}" and its attributes "{object.property}"
User {subject.account.name} accessed object "{object.value}" and its attributes "{object.property}"
